summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a helluva show with only minor noise
review: The reviewer describes the concert as a "Helluva" performance, indicating strong musical energy and enjoyment. The recording is noted to have just a little background noise but otherwise remains clear, suggesting a decent‑to‑good quality soundboard source. Overall the tape is recommended despite the slight hiss.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises both the show and recording, but with only one data point confidence is limited

recording_quality.technical_notes: Minor background noise/hiss noted, otherwise clear and balanced

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply calls it a "Helluva" show
